gaps: No existing test case covers the User Guides screen or the display of sub-devices on it.
No test case verifies that the Falcon Charge Stand (or any sub-device) should NOT appear on the User Guides screen.
All existing test cases focus on onboarding, EULA, splash screen, and location permissions — none relate to the User Guides screen functionality.

generated_testcases.title: Verify Falcon Charge Stand does NOT appear as sub-device on User Guides screen
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow (EULA, splash screen, location permissions).
2. Navigate to the User Guides screen from the main menu/settings.
3. Observe the list of devices displayed on the User Guides screen.
4. Check if any sub-devices (e.g., Falcon Charge Stand) are listed under any main device.
generated_testcases.expected: The Falcon Charge Stand (or any other sub-device/accessory) should NOT appear on the User Guides screen. Only main devices should be listed, and no sub-devices should be visible.

generated_testcases.title: Verify only main devices are displayed on User Guides screen
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow.
2. Navigate to the User Guides screen.
3. Examine the list of devices shown on the screen.
4. Verify that each entry corresponds to a main device (e.g., Falcon, Falcon+, etc.) and not an accessory or sub-device.
generated_testcases.expected: The User Guides screen displays only main devices. No sub-devices, accessories, or add-ons (such as Falcon Charge Stand) are shown in the list.

generated_testcases.title: Verify User Guides screen does not show any sub-devices after navigating from device details
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow.
2. Navigate to the main device list or dashboard.
3. Select a main device (e.g., Falcon) and view its details.
4. From the device details screen, navigate to the User Guides screen.
5. Observe the list of devices/guides displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: The User Guides screen should only show main devices. No sub-devices or accessories (including Falcon Charge Stand) should appear, regardless of how the user navigated to the screen.

generated_testcases.title: Verify User Guides screen content after pairing a Falcon Charge Stand
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow.
2. Pair a Falcon Charge Stand with the application.
3. Navigate to the User Guides screen.
4. Observe the list of devices and guides displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: Even after pairing a Falcon Charge Stand, it should NOT appear as a separate entry or sub-device on the User Guides screen. The screen should only list main devices.

generated_testcases.title: Verify User Guides screen does not list accessories when no main devices are paired
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow without pairing any main device.
2. Pair only a Falcon Charge Stand (accessory) with the application.
3. Navigate to the User Guides screen.
4. Observe the content displayed on the screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The User Guides screen should not display the Falcon Charge Stand or any other accessory. If no main devices are paired, the screen may show an empty state or a message indicating no guides are available, but no sub-devices should be listed.
